description: Dev server and run configurations for Kiwi Control (Tauri 2 + Vite monorepo)

configurations.name: Desktop App (UI dev mode)
configurations.description: Full Tauri + Vite dev loop — builds CLI first, then launches desktop window with hot-reload
notes: Vite dev server starts on http://localhost:1420 (Tauri 2 default)
Native desktop window opens automatically via Tauri

configurations.name: Build All Workspaces
configurations.description: Compile sj-core → sj-cli → sj-ui in dependency order

configurations.name: Build CLI only (sj-cli)
configurations.description: Rebuild only the CLI package — faster than full build when working on CLI logic
configurations.command: npm run build -w @shrey-junior/sj-core && npm run build -w shrey-junior

configurations.name: Build UI only (sj-ui)
configurations.description: Compile and bundle the Tauri/Vite frontend without rebuilding CLI or core

configurations.name: Desktop App (production build)
configurations.description: Full Tauri production bundle — outputs .app/.dmg to apps/sj-ui/src-tauri/target/release/bundle

configurations.name: Audit (CLI audit mode)
configurations.description: Build + run sj-cli audit command against the current repo

configurations.name: Smoke Test
configurations.description: Build + unit tests + smoke-test.sh — full pre-release validation

configurations.name: Unit Tests
configurations.description: Run unit tests for sj-cli package

configurations.name: Release: Prepare Manifest
configurations.description: Build core + generate release manifest JSON

configurations.name: Release: Full Check
configurations.description: Build + test + smoke + release manifest — run before tagging a release

sj-core.description: Core engine — repo-first local control plane logic

sj-cli.description: CLI tool — audit, check, and release commands

sj-ui.description: Tauri 2 desktop app — local-first control surface
